title: Bogus Avast website fakes virus scan, installs Venom Stealer instead

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Bogus Avast website fakes virus scan, installs Venom Stealer
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/30
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '104.21.14.89'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*avast.com*'
            - '*cookies.sqlite*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Bogus_Avast_website_fakes_virus_scan__in {
    meta:
        description = "Bogus Avast website fakes virus scan, installs Venom Stealer"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "ecbeaa13921dbad8028d29534c3878503f45a82a09cf27857fa4335bd1c9286d" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
suricata: alert ip any any -> 104.21.14.89 any (msg:"CDB APEX - Bogus_Avast_website_fakes_viru"; sid:9125057; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 104.21.14.89 any (msg:"CDB APEX Bogus_Avast_website_fakes_viru"; sid:6507149; rev:1;)
